meta.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Trampis PT in Seneca helps runners get back to the road — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Trampis PT — Run Pain-Free Again | Seneca, SC
index.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Trampis PT in Seneca helps runners get back to the road — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Seneca, SC · For runners who refuse to quit
blocks.headline: Get back to running — without pain or the fear of breaking down again
blocks.subhead: Runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, Achilles, plantar fasciitis — we find why it keeps happening and build the gait and strength to keep it gone for good.

blocks.headline: Does running feel like one step forward, two steps back?
blocks.body: You're not too old, too slow, or too broken to run. If any of this hits home, you're exactly who we built this for:
items: The pain returns the moment you add miles back in
You've been told to just rest, ice, and stop running
Nobody ever looked at how you actually run
You're skipping races because you don't trust your body

blocks.headline: If any of that sounds like you, we can help.
blocks.body: There's a reason it keeps coming back — and a clear path to running pain-free again.

blocks.headline: Every week you wait, the goal slips further away

items.title: Afraid every run is a gamble
items.body: You hold back on pace and distance because you never know when the pain will flare and set you back again.

items.title: The same injury, on repeat
items.body: Rest calms it down, then it returns the second you ramp your mileage. The cycle never actually ends.

items.title: Fitness and race goals fading
items.body: Every week off the road costs you endurance, speed, and the race you've been training for. Waiting is expensive.

blocks.headline: Why runners choose Trampis PT
blocks.intro: We don't hand you a hot pack and tell you to stop running. We analyze how you move, find the real driver, and build a smart return-to-run plan around your goals.

items.title: Full running gait analysis
items.body: A 90-minute, head-to-toe evaluation including video gait analysis to find the real mechanics behind your pain.

items.title: A plan built for your mileage
items.body: One-on-one care and a custom plan built around your race goals, weekly mileage, and training schedule.

items.title: A smart return-to-run progression
items.body: We rebuild strength and mechanics and ramp you back step by step — so the injury stays gone, not just until next week.

blocks.headline: Ready to find out why it keeps coming back?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment and gait analysis with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute assessment online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & gait analysis
steps.body: We find the root cause everyone else missed and map out exactly how we'll get you running again.

steps.title: Get back on the road — for good
steps.body: Follow a smart return-to-run plan with a coach in your corner and hit your mileage without fear of re-injury.

blocks.headline: Seneca runners who got back to the road

items.quote: This guy rocks I love him.
Hardest working guy in America!! Justin P

items.name: Kait W
items.quote: Trampis helped me start running immediately!

blocks.headline: Your next PR starts with one assessment.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 running evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment and gait analysis. Every CTA on this page scrolls here.
